active_corpus: GSE164834 + GSE124609 + GSE132447 NCBI GEO RNA-seq count-derived heat-shock contrasts

deferred_sources.GSE123980: total RNA heat-shock metadata ambiguous for primary benchmark; nascent TT-seq not used as primary expression input
deferred_sources.GSE57397: heat-shock and recovery only; no untreated/non-heat control arm

time_course_policy: Related time points or related phenotypes from one accession share a paper_id/source-unit and are mean-aggregated by the score; no max-signal source-unit selection is used.
